ui_delete_desc: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this scan? This action cannot be undone.
ui_warning_doctor: This is only an AI test and does not constitute a real medical diagnosis. Always consult with a qualified healthcare professional for an accurate diagnosis and appropriate medical advice.
ui_out_of_credits_body: You can buy credits from the store to continue using AI analysis.
ui_select_model_desc: Please select the appropriate model for the uploaded image.
heatmap_info:
This heatmap shows exactly which areas of the X-ray the AI focused on to make its prediction.

Warm/Red areas indicate the highest importance, while cool/blue areas were less important.
wp_intro: Our diagnostic assistant is powered by a dual-engine machine learning architecture, designed to evaluate comprehensive anatomical data and provide highly calibrated, multi-label probability scores.
wp_chest_desc:
Built on the DenseNet-121 architecture and trained on the CheXpert dataset, this model evaluates the complete spectrum of thoracic labels simultaneously. 

Key F1 Performance Metrics:
• Lung Opacity: 0.8538
• Pleural Effusion: 0.7727
• Edema: 0.7379
• Support Devices: 0.7099
• Atelectasis: 0.6897
• Enlarged Cardiomediastinum: 0.6863
• Cardiomegaly: 0.6744
• No Finding: 0.6333
• Consolidation: 0.5567
• Pneumonia: 0.1951
• Pneumothorax: 0.1667
• Pleural Other: 0.0588
• Lung Lesion: 0.0140
wp_bone_desc:
Utilizing a deeper DenseNet-169 architecture, this model is engineered to detect bone abnormalities across various study types.

Performance:
• Maximized F1 Score: 0.8066
• Precision: 0.8354
• Recall: 0.7797
wp_method_desc:
Both models were optimized using the AdamW algorithm alongside aggressive data augmentation (cropping and resizing) to prevent overfitting. 

Crucially, we integrate Grad-CAM (Gradient-weighted Class Activation Mapping). This allows us to visually verify that the model is making its predictions based on the correct anatomical structures, rather than guessing based on image artifacts. 

Please note that our models can and do make mistakes. The AI provides insights based on activation areas, but it is not a definitive medical diagnosis. Always consult with a qualified healthcare professional for an accurate diagnosis and appropriate medical advice.
ui_store_description: Buy credits now to continue using AI-powered analysis.
ui_store_unavailable: Store is currently unavailable. Please try again later.
